input: Run a full AS-IS analysis on our Java Spring Boot monolith
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces 10-section assessment: executive dashboard, technology inventory, code organization, C4 architecture, code quality metrics, tech debt inventory, NFR heatmap, security assessment, operational model, and risk register with recommendations

input: Give me a quick technical health check of this codebase — executive summary only
expected_behavior: Skill activates with executive variant (S0 + S5 + S9 + S10), producing executive dashboard, tech debt highlights, top risks, and prioritized recommendations

input: Assess this legacy codebase that has zero test coverage and no CI/CD pipeline
expected_behavior: Skill activates, flags test coverage as CRITICAL (0%), infers CI/CD from Dockerfiles and scripts, extrapolates quality risk via complexity metrics, and recommends test buildout as top priority

input: Evaluate tech debt in our microservices — we need to know what to fix first
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces categorized tech debt inventory (design, code, test, build, documentation, infrastructure, dependency) with severity scoring, business impact, and prioritized remediation pathways

input: Design the future microservices architecture with ADRs and migration plan
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate. This is a target-state (TO-BE) architecture design request. Should route to architecture-tobe skill instead.
